name: Clawkeeper-Watcher
description: Core-only audit, hardening, and behavior rules for OpenClaw

mode.description: Plugin operating mode — 'remote' (read-only judge + passive loggers) or 'local' (full audit/hardening/drift + judge + loggers). Set by clawkeeper launcher.

autoHarden.description: Apply safe hardening steps on gateway start

strictMode.description: Treat missing controls as higher severity

driftMonitor.description: Watch config and AGENTS files for boundary drift

skillGuard.description: Periodically scan user-installed skills for security risks (local mode only)

enabled.description: Enable periodic skill security scanning on gateway start

contextJudge.description: Optional defaults for the /plugins/clawkeeper-watcher/context-judge HTTP route

requireUserConfirmationFor.description: Tool names that should require ask_user by default

autoContinueAllowed.description: Whether risky contexts may continue without ask_user

maxToolStepsWithoutUserTurn.description: Max tool steps allowed before ask_user

treatCommandExecutionAsHighRisk.description: Whether exec/bash/shell should be treated as high risk

fingerprint.description: Cross-session risk fingerprint matching. When enabled, the context-judge compares incoming requests against historical decision patterns and attaches warnings for recurring risks (remote mode only).

enabled.description: Enable cross-session risk fingerprint matching (remote mode only, default: false)

lookbackDays.description: Number of days of decision history to scan for fingerprints (default: 7)

minOccurrences.description: Minimum number of matching historical decisions before a fingerprint is flagged (default: 2)

agentProfiling.description: Agent behavioral profiling. Build per-agent baselines from historical event logs and attach warnings when the current behavior deviates significantly.

lookbackDays.description: Days of event history to use for each agent baseline (default: 7)

toolDeviationThreshold.description: Multiplier threshold for per-tool usage spikes against baseline (default: 3.0)

tokenDeviationThreshold.description: Multiplier threshold for token-per-call spikes against baseline (default: 2.5)

novelToolSeverity.description: Severity level to assign when the agent uses a tool never seen in baseline (default: medium)

intentDrift.description: Semantic intent drift detection. Compares the user's original intent against the tool call chain to detect when actions diverge from what was requested.

enabled.description: Enable semantic intent drift detection (default: false)

threshold.description: Drift score threshold (0-1) above which a drift warning is generated (default: 0.4)

notify.description: Optional outbound notifications for forwarding local startup audit summaries to the user's OpenClaw

userBridge.description: Optional clawkeeper-bands plugin on the user's OpenClaw that receives startup audit notifications

enabled.description: Whether to forward risky local startup audits to the user's OpenClaw clawkeeper-bands plugin

url.description: Base URL for the user's OpenClaw gateway, for example http://127.0.0.1:18789

token.description: Gateway token for the user's OpenClaw instance

path.description: Relative path for the clawkeeper-bands startup audit notification route

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for the startup audit notification request

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: Operating mode set by clawkeeper launcher (remote or local)

autoHarden.label: Auto Harden
autoHarden.help: Run safe hardening actions automatically on startup

strictMode.label: Strict Mode
strictMode.help: Escalate missing controls to stronger warnings

driftMonitor.label: Drift Monitor
driftMonitor.help: Warn when config or AGENTS rules drift after startup

skillGuard.label: Skill Guard
skillGuard.help: Periodically scan installed skills under ~/.openclaw/skills/ for security risks

contextJudge.label: Context Judge
contextJudge.help: Default policy for the /plugins/clawkeeper-watcher/context-judge HTTP route

contextJudge.fingerprint.label: Risk Fingerprints
contextJudge.fingerprint.help: Detect recurring risk patterns across sessions using decision memory

contextJudge.agentProfiling.label: Agent Profiling
contextJudge.agentProfiling.help: Detect per-agent behavior drift from historical event-log baselines

contextJudge.intentDrift.label: Intent Drift
contextJudge.intentDrift.help: Detect when tool calls semantically drift from the user's original intent

notify.label: Notifications
notify.help: Forward risky local startup audits to the user's OpenClaw clawkeeper-bands plugin
